account_permissions.notes: Customer can self-serve via Forgot Password. Support can trigger manually after identity verification.
Customers cannot suspend their own account. Only support agents can suspend after review.
Customer can request deletion via Settings. Support must process within 30 days per data policy.
Refunds cannot be promised or processed by the AI. Must be escalated to a human support agent.
Customer can upgrade via Billing Settings. Support can assist if customer faces issues.
Downgrade takes effect at end of current billing cycle. No partial refunds for downgrades.
AI agents must never promise a refund directly. Always escalate to human agent.
